scene_descriptions.page_description: A dark screen with text instructions for the user to start screen sharing. A browser notification at the bottom indicates screen sharing is active.
Dark screen displaying the initial task instructions for the user research session.
Dark screen with the continuation of the task instructions.
Dark screen with instructions for the user to think aloud during the task.
A Figma prototype showing a mobile app interface for exploring research opportunities. Sections include 'Short tasks & surveys' and 'Sessions to schedule'.
The same mobile app prototype view as the previous frame, with the cursor positioned over the 'Video Call' card.
A scrolled-down view of the mobile app prototype, showing more opportunity cards like 'Diary Study' and a higher-paying 'AI Interview'.
Dark screen with a follow-up question from the AI moderator based on the user's previous comments.
The user has navigated back to the top of the mobile app prototype.
The top view of the mobile app prototype remains visible.
Dark screen with a detailed question from the AI moderator about the user's observations of 'new little bubbles' and labels.
Dark screen with the moderator's question and a browser tooltip about 'Split view' appearing at the top.
Dark screen with a new question from the moderator about what information helps the user determine applicability.
The user returns to the prototype, with the cursor near the 'Short tasks & surveys' heading.
Dark screen with the full text of the moderator's question about determining 'how long it takes'.
Scrolled-down view of the prototype showing cards for 'Diary Study', 'AI Interview', and 'Video Call'.
The moderator's question about time duration remains on the dark screen.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'Video Call' card.
Dark screen with a question about what stands out as fitting into a 15-minute break.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.
Dark screen with a question about the appeal of the 10-minute AI interview.
The top view of the mobile app prototype is shown again.
Dark screen with the full question about the appeal of the AI interview compared to other options.
The moderator's question about the AI interview remains on screen.
The top view of the mobile app prototype is shown.
Dark screen with a question about what else the user is noticing while browsing.
The top view of the mobile app prototype is shown.
Dark screen with a question about distinguishing between the displayed items.
Dark screen with the full question about how the display helps distinguish between opportunities.
The top view of the mobile app prototype is shown.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.
Dark screen with a question about the significance of the different colors.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.
Dark screen with the full question about the meaning of the different colored labels.
The top view of the mobile app prototype is shown.
Dark screen with a question about the user's impression of how information is organized.
Dark screen with the full question about the organization of information via colored labels.
Scrolled-down view of the prototype showing 'In Person', 'Diary Study', and 'AI Interview' cards.
Dark screen with a question about what helps the user decide which opportunities to click on.
Dark screen with the full question about decision-making factors when exploring opportunities.
Dark screen with a question about the meaning of device information (mobile vs desktop). A browser tab preview is visible.
Scrolled-down view of the prototype.
The 'Filter Opportunities' modal is open in the prototype, showing various filter categories like Task Type, Duration, and Pay Rate.
The prototype view after applying a 'Mobile Only' filter, showing 9 results.
Dark screen with a prompt for the user to try out the filtering options.
Dark screen with a question about the user's experience interacting with the filtering options.
Prototype view showing the 'Save these preferences' toggle at the bottom of the screen.
Dark screen with a question comparing the filtered mobile view to the previous view.
Prototype view showing the filtered results for mobile opportunities.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'Mobile Only x' filter tag.
Dark screen with a question about what on-screen indicators show that a filter has been applied.
The filtered results view in the mobile app prototype.
Dark screen with a question about what is catching the user's eye among the filtered opportunities.
Dark screen with a question about why the user might lean towards a short task. Browser tab preview is visible.
The filtered results view in the mobile app prototype.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.
Dark screen with a question about decision-making factors for choosing a short task.
The filtered results view in the mobile app prototype.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'People v delivery' card.
Dark screen with a question about curiosity regarding options with the same duration.
Dark screen with a partially displayed question from the moderator.
Prototype view with the cursor hovering over the 'AI Interview' card.
Dark screen with a concluding question from the moderator, suggesting moving on from the prototype.
